_help: Planning overlay applied by build-ledger.mjs. Per file: classification (PORT|NO-COUNTERPART|REVIEW-CLASS), tsFile, planningNote. Per item: state (PENDING|NO-COUNTERPART only - planning never sets APPLIED/ESCALATED), tsFunction, functionGroup (optional override), rationale (required iff state=NO-COUNTERPART). The optional `reconstruction` section declares v26-baseline reconstruction items (id must contain "#recon/"); each needs spec, blocks (>=1 hunk id), tsFile, tsFunction. Edit THIS file, never ledger.json; then re-run build-ledger.mjs.

src/spicelib/analysis/Makefile.am.planningNote: Autotools build manifest. digiTS has no C build system; analysis wiring is ES-module imports + Vite. PLANNING.md 5(a). Added sources (cktspnoise/noisesp/optran/com_optran/cktspdum/span/spaskq/spsetp) are themselves noise/optran/RFSPICE NO-COUNTERPART files.

src/spicelib/analysis/acan.c.planningNote: ACan / CKTacLoad map to AcAnalysis.run() frequency-sweep loop + per-element stampAc accumulation. DC-OP relinearization, freq-delta (DECADE/OCTAVE/LINEAR), AC RHS clear/load. AC implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/acsetp.c.planningNote: ACsetParm AC_START/AC_STOP validation maps to AcParams validation. v41 relaxes the bound from <=0 to <0. AC implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/analysis.c.planningNote: SPICEanalysis dispatch-table array (analInfo[]). Both hunks only add RFSPICE SPinfo / WITH_HB HBinfo entries (S-parameter and harmonic-balance), neither implemented (analysis-scope.md). digiTS dispatches via the AnalogEngine interface, not a C job table.

src/spicelib/analysis/cktdest.c.planningNote: CKTdestroy C heap teardown (FREE of rhs/state/matrix, evt_dest, RFSPICE cmat frees). JS is GC-managed; engine drops its object graph on dispose(). PLANNING.md 5(a).

src/spicelib/analysis/cktdisto.c.planningNote: CKTdisto distortion analysis driver (D_SETUP/D_RHSF1/D_RHSF2). Distortion not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/cktdltm.c.planningNote: CKTdltMod C heap free of a model+instances (tfree to GENinstanceFree/GENmodelFree). JS GC. PLANNING.md 5(a).

src/spicelib/analysis/cktdltn.c.planningNote: CKTdltNNum deletes a node from the C CKTnodes linked list; hunk adds a controlled_exit guard. digiTS has no CKTnodes list (nodes are compiler-assigned indices). PLANNING.md 5(a).

src/spicelib/analysis/cktdojob.c.planningNote: CKTdoJob copies TSKtask params into the circuit then dispatches. TSK->CKT param transfer maps to ckt-context field population (incl. v41-new indverbosity/xmu/cshunt/epsmin). Include/extern-decl + WANT_SENSE2 sub-blocks have no counterpart; resolved per hunk.

src/spicelib/analysis/cktfndm.c.planningNote: CKTfndMod C hash lookup of a model by name; hunk adds a null-ckt guard. digiTS resolves models at compile time, not via a runtime MODnameHash. PLANNING.md 5(a).

src/spicelib/analysis/ckti2nod.c.planningNote: CKTinst2Node front-end query returning a bound CKTnode+name from an instance+terminal, walking the C CKTnodes list and per-instance GENnodeN fields. digiTS has no GENnode array nor CKTnodes list; node binding resolved in the compiler. Not a DC/TRAN/AC numerical path. PLANNING.md 5(a).

src/spicelib/analysis/cktic.c.planningNote: CKTic applies .ic/.nodeset initial values into the RHS before the DC-OP solve. digiTS implements nodeset/IC (nr-nodeset-parity.test.ts). v41 hunk also writes CKTrhsOld so the seed survives into the first NR comparison.

src/spicelib/analysis/cktload.c.planningNote: CKTload per-iteration device load() driver maps to cktLoad(). The single v41 hunk only adds an XSPICE enh.h include (rshunt); that lone hunk is NO-COUNTERPART, resolved at item level.

src/spicelib/analysis/cktmcrt.c.planningNote: CKTmodCrt C heap alloc of a GENmodel + new GENinstanceFree/GENmodelFree heap-free helpers. digiTS creates model objects in the compiler; JS GC frees them. PLANNING.md 5(a).

src/spicelib/analysis/cktncdump.c.planningNote: CKTncDump non-convergence per-node last-vs-previous voltage dump maps to cktncDump() (dc-operating-point.ts:258-269). v41 hunk fixes node-name filter strstr(name,#) to strchr(name,#).

src/spicelib/analysis/cktnoise.c.planningNote: CKTnoise noise-source naming/evaluation driver. Noise not implemented (analysis-scope.md). Hunks add sqrnoise squared_value handling.

src/spicelib/analysis/cktntask.c.planningNote: CKTnewTask builds a TSKtask copying app/option defaults. v41 hunks add TSKindverbosity/TSKxmu/TSKcshunt/TSKepsmin defaults mapping to ckt-context default fields feeding DC-OP/transient/integration.

src/spicelib/analysis/cktop.c.planningNote: CKTop + CKTconvTest + dynamic_gmin/spice3_gmin/new_gmin/gillespie_src/spice3_src are the DC-OP three-level convergence stack mapped explicitly in the dc-operating-point.ts header. DC-OP implemented (analysis-scope.md). v41 adds a new_gmin level and the OPtran tail call (OPtran itself separately NO-COUNTERPART).

src/spicelib/analysis/cktpname.c.planningNote: CKTpName front-end parser helper: set a device instance parameter by keyword string during netlist parse. digiTS sets element params from the CircuitSpec/property-bag at compile time, not a runtime IFparm keyword scan. PLANNING.md 5(a).

src/spicelib/analysis/cktpzset.c.planningNote: CKTpzSetup pole-zero matrix setup. Pole-zero not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/cktpzstr.c.planningNote: CKTpzFindZeros / PZeval pole-zero search strategy. Pole-zero not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/cktsens.c.planningNote: sens_sens sensitivity analysis driver. Sensitivity not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/cktsetbk.c.planningNote: CKTsetBreak registers a transient breakpoint, mapping to the TimestepController breakpoint queue. v41 adds AlmostEqualUlps early-out when the new breakpoint equals current time, plus a null-guard on the CKTbreaks tail compare. Transient implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/cktsetup.c.planningNote: CKTsetup/CKTunsetup per-device setup()/unsetup() driver + matrix alloc maps to compiler.ts expandCompositeInstance + element setup() walk and NIinit. v41 adds head/DEVices null guards and prev_CKTlastNode incomplete-unsetup detection. XSPICE rshunt include NO-COUNTERPART; resolved per hunk.

src/spicelib/analysis/cktsgen.c.planningNote: sgen_init sensitivity generator iterator. Sensitivity not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/cktsopt.c.planningNote: CKTsetOpt + OPTtbl .options dispatch and keyword table. v41-new options indverbosity/xmu/cshunt/epsmin map to ckt-context fields used by DC-OP/transient/integration. XSPICE evt/enh include and description-only edits resolved per hunk.

src/spicelib/analysis/cktspdum.c.planningNote: New file, entirely #ifdef RFSPICE: CKTspDump / CKTspCalcSMatrix / CKTspCalcPowerWave S-parameter raw output. S-parameter (RFSPICE) not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/cktspnoise.c.planningNote: New file, body gated by #ifdef RFSPICE_ (dead even in ngspice) for S-parameter noise. Neither noise nor S-parameter implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/ckttroub.c.planningNote: CKTtrouble formats a failure message naming the current DC-sweep (TRCV) source/resistor/temp value; the whole function is bound to the TRCV (.dc sweep) job. .dc transfer-curve sweep is OUT of scope (#54; analysis-scope.md amended 2026-05-29), so dctrcurv.c/ckttroub.c are NO-COUNTERPART. digiTS reports convergence failures via its own diagnostics (cktncDump / convergence log), not the TRCV-specific sweep-point message.

src/spicelib/analysis/ckttrunc.c.planningNote: CKTtrunc per-node local-truncation-error timestep bound maps to ckt-terr.ts. Transient implemented (analysis-scope.md). The single hunk only removes a stray token after #endif.

src/spicelib/analysis/com_optran.h.planningNote: Prototype header for com_optran (the optran command). optran (transient-based OP) is a separate analysis driver digiTS does not implement; see optran.c. PLANNING.md 5(a) + open question on optran scope.

src/spicelib/analysis/dcop.c.planningNote: DCop the .op entry: CKTop then SMSIG load. DC-OP implemented (analysis-scope.md). Hunk deletes a commented-out node-dump block and tidies the failure return that calls CKTncDump (cktncDump in digiTS).

src/spicelib/analysis/dcpss.c.planningNote: DCpss periodic steady-state (PSS) driver (gated WITH_PSS). PSS not in the implemented set (analysis-scope.md lists only DC-OP/transient/AC). PLANNING.md 5(b) + open question.

src/spicelib/analysis/dctran.c.planningNote: DCtran transient time-marching driver (TRANop, breakpoint mgmt, state rotation, dt cut/grow, accept) maps to MNAEngine.step/stepToTime + TimestepController + integration.ts. Transient implemented (analysis-scope.md). v41 hunks: bcopy->memcpy, MODEUIC IC print/dump path, breakpoint pop-loop rework, CKTsizeIncr 10->100, ft_norefprint gating.

src/spicelib/analysis/dctrcurv.c.planningNote: DCtrCurv the .dc transfer-curve (TRCV) sweep driver: nested V/I/R/temp source stepping with state rotation and per-point CKTop. .dc transfer-curve sweep is OUT of scope (#54; analysis-scope.md amended 2026-05-29 — digiTS does parametric sweeps via parameter-sweep.ts component-property re-runs + external repeated dc_op, not the ngspice TRCV nest-level driver). NO-COUNTERPART per PLANNING.md §5 (driver of a non-implemented analysis).

src/spicelib/analysis/distoan.c.planningNote: DISTOan / DISswap distortion analysis driver. Distortion not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/nevalsrc.c.planningNote: NevalSrc evaluates a single noise-source contribution. Noise not implemented (analysis-scope.md). Large v41 additions are #ifdef RFSPICE S-parameter noise-current correlation; legacy body is the AC-noise gain helper.

src/spicelib/analysis/noisean.c.planningNote: NOISEan the .noise analysis driver. Noise not implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5(b).

src/spicelib/analysis/noisesp.c.planningNote: New file NOISEsp, body gated by #ifdef RFSPICE_ (dead): S-parameter noise driver. Neither noise nor S-parameter implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/optran.c.planningNote: New file: com_optran command + OPtran driver generating the OP by a damped transient (own opfinaltime/opstepsize/opramptime + breakpoint table). Not in the implemented set (analysis-scope.md): DC-OP is the direct/gmin/source-step stack in cktop.c which digiTS ports; optran is a distinct driver. PLANNING.md 5(b) + open question. The CKTop tail OPtran call returns the prior converged value when optran is unset, so omitting it is behavior-preserving on the default path.

src/spicelib/analysis/sensaskq.c.planningNote: SENSask sensitivity parameter getter. Sensitivity not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/senssetp.c.planningNote: SENSsetParam + SENSparms sensitivity setter/table. Sensitivity not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/span.c.planningNote: New file, entirely #ifdef RFSPICE: SPan / CKTspnoise / NInspIter / S-Y-Z matrix machinery for S-parameter analysis. S-parameter (RFSPICE) not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/spaskq.c.planningNote: New file, entirely #ifdef RFSPICE: SPaskQuest S-parameter param getter. S-parameter not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/spsetp.c.planningNote: New file, entirely #ifdef RFSPICE: SPsetParm + SPparms + SPinfo registration for S-parameter analysis. Not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

src/spicelib/analysis/tfanal.c.planningNote: TFanal the .tf small-signal transfer-function / IO-resistance driver. IN scope per #57 (analysis-scope.md amended 2026-05-29): a thin driver over the linearized DC Jacobian (DC transfer ratio output/input + input/output resistance). Absent in src/ today, so both hunks are PENDING blocked by analysis#recon/tf, which builds the .tf driver before the v41 deltas apply.

src/spicelib/analysis/traninit.c.planningNote: TRANinit copies .tran params into the circuit and derives CKTmaxStep. Transient implemented (analysis-scope.md). v41 hunk gates the (tstop-tstart)/50 max-step default on the new nostepsizelimit variable.

src/spicelib/analysis/transetp.c.planningNote: TRANsetParm .tran TSTOP validation. Transient implemented (analysis-scope.md). Single hunk fixes a TST0P->TSTOP typo in the error string.

analysis/ckttroub.c#h001.rationale: CKTtrouble preamble. CKTtrouble formats the TRCV (.dc sweep) failure message; .dc transfer-curve sweep is OUT of scope (#54; analysis-scope.md amended 2026-05-29). NO-COUNTERPART per PLANNING.md §5 (part of a non-implemented analysis driver).

analysis/ckttroub.c#h002.rationale: CKTtrouble body — adds the resistor/temp TRCV-sweep cases to the failure message naming the swept source/resistor/temp. .dc transfer-curve sweep OUT of scope (#54). digiTS reports convergence failure via its own diagnostics (cktncDump / convergence log), not the TRCV sweep-point message. PLANNING.md §5.

analysis/ckttroub.c#h003.rationale: CKTtrouble body (continued) — further TRCV-sweep failure-message cases. .dc transfer-curve sweep OUT of scope (#54). NO-COUNTERPART per PLANNING.md §5.

NO-COUNTERPART per PLANNING.md §5.

analysis/noisesp.c#h001.rationale: New file NOISEsp, body gated by #ifdef RFSPICE_ (dead): S-parameter noise driver. Neither noise nor S-parameter implemented (analysis-scope.md).

analysis/optran.c#h001.rationale: New file: com_optran command + OPtran driver generating the OP by a damped transient (own opfinaltime/opstepsize/opramptime + breakpoint table). Not in the implemented set (analysis-scope.md): DC-OP is the direct/gmin/source-step stack in cktop.c which digiTS ports; optran is a distinct driver. PLANNING.md 5(b) + open question. The CKTop tail OPtran call returns the prior converged value when optran is unset, so omitting it is behavior-preserving on the default path.

analysis/sensaskq.c#h001.rationale: SENSask sensitivity parameter getter. Sensitivity not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

analysis/senssetp.c#h001.rationale: SENSsetParam + SENSparms sensitivity setter/table. Sensitivity not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

analysis/senssetp.c#h002.rationale: SENSsetParam + SENSparms sensitivity setter/table. Sensitivity not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

analysis/span.c#h001.rationale: New file, entirely #ifdef RFSPICE: SPan / CKTspnoise / NInspIter / S-Y-Z matrix machinery for S-parameter analysis. S-parameter (RFSPICE) not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

analysis/spaskq.c#h001.rationale: New file, entirely #ifdef RFSPICE: SPaskQuest S-parameter param getter. S-parameter not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

analysis/spsetp.c#h001.rationale: New file, entirely #ifdef RFSPICE: SPsetParm + SPparms + SPinfo registration for S-parameter analysis. Not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

analysis/tfanal.c#h001.tsFunction: src/solver/analog/dc-operating-point.ts :: .tf driver (transfer ratio + Zin/Zout over the factored DC Jacobian) — blocked by analysis#recon/tf

analysis/tfanal.c#h002.tsFunction: src/solver/analog/dc-operating-point.ts :: .tf driver (TFanal body) — blocked by analysis#recon/tf

analysis#recon/tf.title: Build the .tf small-signal transfer-function analysis as a thin driver over the existing linearized DC solve: after the DC operating point, compute the small-signal transfer ratio d(output)/d(input source) plus the input resistance (at the input source) and output resistance (at the output port) from the factored DC Jacobian. New IN-scope analysis per #57 (analysis-scope.md amended 2026-05-29); no v26 baseline in digiTS (absent today). Reconstruct the driver so the v41 tfanal.c hunks apply as ordinary per-hunk deltas.
ngspiceBaseline: src/spicelib/analysis/tfanal.c (TFanal: small-signal transfer ratio + input/output resistance from the linearized DC system)
analysis#recon/tf.tsFunction: a new .tf driver over the factored DC Jacobian (transfer ratio + Zin/Zout) on the AnalogEngine, plus the facade/MCP surface (circuit_tf) to expose it

analysis#recon/cktIcRhsOldSeed.title: Seed the previous-solution buffer at IC/nodeset setup: port CKTic's CKTrhsOld[n]=CKTrhs[n]=value dual-write (cktic.c:31,39) so iteration 0 of a .ic/.nodeset circuit starts from the constrained voltage. Complementary to the per-iteration maths-sparse#recon/nodesetIcRowZero matrix stamp; FIX-002 (compiler propagation + ctx.ics/nodesets seeded before _allocateNodesetIcHandles) is the shared precondition that is already landed. digiTS today reaches the matrix (matrix axis null) but never seeds rhsOld, so iter-0 voltage/rhs/state diverge.
analysis#recon/cktIcRhsOldSeed.tsFunction: the CKTic-counterpart IC/nodeset setup in MNAEngine: after the RHS buffers are zeroed and before the first NR solve, write each ctx.nodesets / ctx.ics value into BOTH rhs[node] and rhsOld[node] via a direct rhsOld[node]=rhs[node]=value assignment (not stampRHS's +=)

analysis#recon/opTran.title: Port ngspice OPtran, the operating-point pseudo-transient last-resort convergence fallback (optran.c), plus its CKTop call site (cktop.c:101-108): an opt-in (nooptran default true) fallback invoked after direct + gmin + source stepping that reuses the existing transient kernel. Default-off => DC-OP byte-identical to today. The cosmetic/gmin-restructure portions of cktop.c#h001 are Decision-1 OUT; only the behavioral OPtran integration is reconstructed here.
ngspiceBaseline: src/spicelib/analysis/optran.c (OPtran: pseudo-transient 0..opfinaltime reusing the transient kernel, no output capture)
src/spicelib/analysis/cktop.c (CKTop OPtran call site + outcome mapping, :101-108)
analysis#recon/opTran.tsFunction: an OPtran fallback in solveDcOperatingPoint after source stepping (gated on the optran option) reusing MNAEngine's transient stepping; plus the optran/opstepsize/opfinaltime/opramptime option surface
